channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 12-year-old boy dies in swimming pool hours after baptism preparations in Kirinyaga
item.description: A tragic incident unfolded in Ngurubani, Mwea, Kirinyaga County, when a 12-year-old boy drowned in a pool just hours after attending baptism preparations at St. Joseph Allamano Wanguru Catholic Church...

item.title: Geordin Hill-Lewis and Sibusiso Dyonase Contend for DA Leadership at Federal Congress
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) is holding its largest federal congress yet at the Gallagher Convention Centre in Midrand, Johannesburg, to elect a new party leader following John Steenhuisen’s decision ...

item.title: Migrant Workers from Cooch Behar Disrupt Jaipur's Daily Life as They Head Back Home to Vote
item.description: Ahead of Bengal's crucial April 23 polls, a significant number of migrant workers from Cooch Behar have taken leave from their jobs in Jaipur to exercise their right to vote. With more than 80% of dom...

item.title: Tharaka Nithi Woman Shares the Qualities She Wants in a Husband
item.description: A 32-year-old woman from Tharaka Nithi, Rosemary Kagendo, has openly sought help to find a husband, stating that she wants someone she can stay with through joy and hardship. She outlined the key qual...

item.title: Kenya fuel import scandal exposes deep corruption and institutional failure
item.description: This opinion piece by Lewis Ngunyi sharply criticises the recent fuel scandal in Kenya, where emergency imports of fuel outside the normal Government-to-Government arrangements led to serious allegati...

item.title: BINI Makes History with Landmark Coachella Performance
item.description: BINI, the Filipino pop group, made history with their first-ever performance at the internationally renowned Coachella music festival. Their debut was widely celebrated as a milestone for P-Pop, showc...

item.title: Global aviation sector faces fuel supply risk due to ongoing U.S.–Iran tensions and closure of the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The Airports Council International (ACI), a global organization representing airports worldwide, has raised serious concerns about potential jet fuel shortages if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed d...

item.title: Wole Soyinka and the Silence of the Sage in Tinubu’s Nigeria
item.description: At almost ninety-two years old, Wole Soyinka still dey strong and wise, but many Nigerians dey wonder why the old lion dey keep quiet while President Tinubu’s government dey commit many wahala. The wr...

item.title: Montreal Gynecologist Suspended for Inappropriate and Humiliating Medical Practices
item.description: A Montreal gynecologist has been suspended for three months after performing what has been described as ‘traumatic’ and ‘humiliating’ medical procedures on patients. The suspension follows a thorough ...

item.title: ANC’s Mbalula on SACP decision to contest elections solo: 'It's traumatic'
item.description: The South African Communist Party (SACP) has decided to contest the upcoming local government elections on its own, stepping away from its longstanding alliance with the ANC. This move has been descri...

item.title: Nelson Mandela Bay Hospital Faces Cardiology Crisis Due to Contract Lapses
item.description: Livingstone Hospital in Nelson Mandela Bay experienced a critical cardiology crisis for nine days in early April 2026, leaving patients at significant risk. The situation arose due to an administrativ...

item.title: Court Grants Temporary Pause on Alberta Independence Petition Certification
item.description: A judge in Edmonton has issued a month-long stay preventing Alberta’s chief electoral officer from certifying the results of a petition that seeks to trigger a referendum on Alberta separating from Ca...

item.title: How the Artemis II astronauts will safely return through Earth's atmosphere
item.description: After a successful mission to the Moon, the Artemis II astronauts are preparing for their return to Earth. They reached a record distance of 406,771 kilometres from Earth, making their re-entry a high...

item.title: Astronauts Return to Earth After Historic Artemis II Lunar Flyby
item.description: The crew of NASA’s Artemis II mission has successfully returned to Earth after completing their mission, which involved a historic journey around the Moon. The Artemis II flight, launched from Cape Ca...

item.title: Bihar man arrested for allegedly threatening Prime Minister Modi's security
item.description: In Bihar, a man named Amal Kumar Tiwari has been taken into custody by the police after he allegedly made threats against the security of Prime Minister Narendra Modi. The authorities acted promptly f...

item.title: Kylie Jenner attends Coachella 2026 supporting Justin Bieber
item.description: The 2026 Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival kicked off in Indio, California, with numerous high-profile celebrities in attendance. Kylie Jenner, 28, was among the first to arrive, showing suppor...

item.title: Man arrested after Molotov cocktail attack on OpenAI CEO's home in San Francisco
item.description: A 20-year-old man has been arrested after throwing a Molotov cocktail at the San Francisco home of Sam Altman, the CEO of OpenAI. The attack occurred early on Friday, setting fire to the exterior gate...

item.title: Exploring Loneliness and Solitude in Contemporary India: A Review of ‘Writing from the Solitary’
item.description: In the highly connected world of the 2020s, loneliness paradoxically remains pervasive despite constant accessibility through digital means. The anthology 'Writing from the Solitary', edited by Semeen...

item.title: Artemis II Crew Successfully Returns to Earth After Space Mission
item.description: The Artemis II crew has successfully returned to Earth after completing their historic mission, marking a significant achievement in space exploration. Following their splashdown, the astronauts emerg...

item.title: Sylfirm X introduces new non-invasive skin care options in Manila
item.description: Sylfirm X, a revolutionary non-invasive skin care treatment, has made its debut in Manila, bringing a fresh approach to beauty clinics. Known for its ability to address skin concerns like aging and ac...
